title: Open Banking & Payments Roundtable
description_short: Curated roundtable on open banking APIs, PSD3, and the next wave of payments infrastructure. Featuring speakers from Danske Bank, Nykredit, Jyske Bank.

title: Retail Tech Denmark — AI in Customer Experience
description_short: How Danish retailers are reshaping customer experience with AI. Keynotes from Matas, Bilka, Magasin and Rema 1000. Panel on e-commerce conversion and mobile app UX by Anna Lindberg from Coop.
keywords_match: AI, UX, customer experience, e-com, e-commerce, mobile app, retail

title: E-commerce Denmark 2026 — Conversion & UX Summit
description_short: Denmark's largest e-commerce conference. 40+ speakers on conversion optimization, mobile commerce, UX research. Speakers from Zalando, Matas, Salling Group.

title: Nordic Fintech Week 2026
description_short: The largest fintech conference in the Nordics. Connect with founders, investors, banks, and corporates across open banking, payments, AI in finance. Confirmed speakers from Saxo Bank, Lunar, Pleo.
keywords_match: AI, banking, fintech, open banking, payments

title: Nordic Banking Forum 2026
description_short: Executive forum for BFSI leaders. Speakers from Danske Bank, Nordea, SEB and Nykredit. Focus on digital banking transformation.

title: Nordic Insurance Innovation Forum
description_short: Forum for insurance executives and innovation leads. Sessions on AI claims processing, digital-first insurance products. Speakers from Tryg, Topdanmark, Codan and Alm. Brand.

title: App Store Optimization Workshop
description_short: Interactive online workshop covering ASO fundamentals, keyword research for Nordic markets, and A/B testing store listings for iOS and Android apps.
keywords_match: ASO, Android, app store optimization, iOS

title: Copenhagen Mobile Meetup #38
description_short: Monthly meetup for iOS and Android developers. Talks on Kotlin Multiplatform, SwiftUI, and scaling mobile teams. Free pizza and beer.
keywords_match: Android, UI, iOS, kotlin multiplatform, multiplatform

title: Design Systems Copenhagen
description_short: Half-day summit for design system leads. Sessions on tokenization, design-to-code pipelines, and governance models at scale.

title: UX Research Copenhagen — B2B Edition
description_short: UX research methodologies for B2B SaaS. How to recruit, interview and synthesize findings when your users have day jobs.

title: Scaleup Masterclass: German-Market-Entry Workshop
description_short: Workshop for Nordic fintechs entering Germany: strategy, expert talks, group work.

title: Quantum Computing in Finance — Quantum as a Component
description_short: Join Anna Jensen from Danske Bank and speaker Peter Olsen from Nordea for a clear understanding of where quantum stands today and what it means for financial organisations.

title: Demo Day: Digital Assets
description_short: Demo day focused on digital assets, crypto, and blockchain fintechs from the Nordic region.
